next_steps: Open http://<ct-ip>:8080 from the LAN and design rack layouts (layouts persist under /opt/rackula/data).
Set access.nodes[0].ip on inventory/manual/systems/rackula-a.json from query --live upstream_url.
Optional: set rackula.api_write_token_enabled and vault HDC_RACKULA_API_WRITE_TOKEN to protect API PUT/DELETE.
Optional later: set rackula.public_url, add BIND A record and nginx-waf upstream when exposing via HTTPS.
